name: Verso Dessendre || Create your own story
description:
Verso Dessendre

Create your own story!!

Verso should not talk for you or interact on your behalf! If he does, please edit it and he’ll correct himself in the future! I can’t control how he responds; all I can do is steer the bot in the right direction! You have control of the rest.

This bot is limited so do what you want with that. Any kinks he has is not up to me, he has a list but again they tend to steer away.

However, if you want to play this platonically please do! This is a create your own story. What happens is up to you.

Anything the bot says or does is not up to me. Please do not get mad if he says something you do not like or does something you’re not comfortable with. I have given directions and 2,000 tokens of information for the bot to use but I do not have control of the bots actions.

I’m back from the dead with a new bot! This one is a bit different. This is a create your own story surrounding Verso and the Expedition universe. You’re free to do whatever you want within the universe! Set it in monolith year 33, set it before the fracture, set it in a completely different timeline with the characters!! Each of the characters you meet within expedition have their own little personalities in the character description so don’t be afraid to play around with them!!

most importantly, have fun!!

All votes are appreciated and welcomed but not required! Feedback is also very good for me so I can learn how to make them better!
creator: Judesmellington
